title: knema cantleyi
intro: Knema cantleyi, also known as the Kanemite or Quinine Tree, is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of the Knema cantleyi plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Knema cantleyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the bark and leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
